text.title: EU AI Act Compliance — Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing `eu-ai-act-compliance` applied to a real-shape scenario.

section.title: Worked example: HR-screening SaaS
section.p: System: SaaS tool that scores incoming CVs for fit-to-role across EU enterprise customers. Built on a fine-tuned 7B model + RAG over job descriptions.

list.item: Step 1: deployment_region.contains('EU')=true; primary_purpose='employment screening'; is_gpai=false (downstream fine-tune below 10^25 FLOPs).
Step 2: Article 5 not matched. Annex III(4) employment matched. risk_tier=high-risk.
Step 5: gaps={Article 13: instructions-for-use missing}. next_actions=[draft Article 11 doc, wire override button, publish bias-assessment].
Step 6: legal counsel sign-off pending on borderline Article 9(3) substantial-modification clause.
